message:
fix: add timeout guards to init-path R2 reads + broadcast RPC

refreshStaleTables (query-do.ts): sequential R2 reads had no timeout,
could hang DO initialization indefinitely. Now wraps entire per-table
refresh in withTimeout(10s) with per-table try/catch — a slow table
logs a warning instead of blocking all other tables.

readFooterAndColumns (master-do.ts): 3 R2 reads (head + tail + meta)
had no timeout — could hang writeRpc/refreshRpc responses. Now each
R2 call wrapped in withTimeout(10s).

broadcast invalidateRpc (master-do.ts): RPC to Query DOs had no
timeout — a slow DO wake could stall the write response. Now 5s
timeout per DO, matching the existing failure counter logic.
